assertions.description: SubtleCrypto.generateKey({ name: 'X25519' }, ...) is accepted and returns a Promise (the X25519 algorithm is recognised).
SubtleCrypto.importKey accepts the X25519 algorithm identifier.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const dummy=new Uint8Array(32);const p=crypto.subtle.importKey('raw',dummy,{name:'X25519'},true,[]);return p instanceof Promise;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: SubtleCrypto.deriveBits is exposed (used with an X25519 algorithm input).
SubtleCrypto.deriveKey is exposed; X25519 is used as the input algorithm.
